---
title: "gentiled.github.io"
resources: resume.pdf
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - text: Email
      icon: envelope
      href: mailto:gentiledv@gmail.com
    - text: resume
      icon: file-text
      href: resume.pdf
---

This is a Quarto website.

To learn more about Quarto websites visit <https://quarto.org/docs/websites>.

```{r}
1 + 1
```
